allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; print\([p for p in sys.path if ''site-packages'' in p][0]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; print\(Path\(sys.executable\).parent / ''Lib'' / ''site-packages''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.instrumentation import install_hook; print\(''✓ instrumentation.py 模块可导入''\); print\(f''✓ install_hook 函数: {callable\(install_hook\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.instrumentation import install_hook; print\(''OK: instrumentation module importable''\); print\(''OK: install_hook is callable'' if callable\(install_hook\) else ''FAIL''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.gateway.auto_catcher import auto_catch_and_route, _format_pacification_message; print\(''OK: auto_catch_and_route importable''\); print\(''OK: _format_pacification_message exists'' if callable\(_format_pacification_message\) else ''FAIL''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.gateway.auto_catcher import auto_catch_and_route; import inspect; decorator = auto_catch_and_route\(region=''cn''\); print\(''OK: Decorator factory mode works''\); print\(f''OK: Returns callable: {callable\(decorator\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.gateway.auto_catcher import auto_catch_and_route; decorator = auto_catch_and_route\(region=''cn''\); print\(''OK: Decorator factory mode works''\); print\(f''OK: Returns callable: {callable\(decorator\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''e:/hub''\); from client_sdk.gateway.auto_catcher import auto_catch_and_route; import asyncio; @auto_catch_and_route; async def test1\(\): raise Exception\(''test''\); @auto_catch_and_route\(region=''cn''\); async def test2\(\): raise Exception\(''test''\); print\(''OK: Both decorator syntaxes work''\)")

Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; env = Path.home\(\) / ''.clawhub'' / ''.env''; print\(f''Env exists: {env.exists\(\)}''\); load_dotenv\(env\) if env.exists\(\) else None; print\(f''REGION: {os.getenv\(""CLAWHUB_REGION""\)}''\); print\(f''TUNNEL: {os.getenv\(""TUNNEL_PROVIDER""\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; import os; exe_path = os.path.join\(sys.prefix, ''Scripts'', ''clawhub.exe''\); print\(exe_path\); print\(''存在:'', os.path.exists\(exe_path\)\)")
